subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: This feast belongs to the illustrious pilgrims of the Jewish descent.... In the East it was prohibited for men and women to assemble in the same room. However in this Dispensation, the women have the same rank as men
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مهمانی مال حضرات زائرین کلیمی است از فضل جمال مبارک در این حفله و در این مائده جمع شده اند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity in diversity, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @unity; oneness of humanity, @equality of men and women
